name: Graham Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients (Graham flour, whole wheat flour, sugar, salt, and baking soda).
3. Add the buttermilk and mix thoroughly until a batter forms.
4. Pour the batter into a greased loaf pan.
5. Place the pan in the oven.
6. Turn the thermostat down to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
7. Bake for one hour.
